benefits.description: Lost 64 pounds over the course of a year, going from 200 lbs to 136 lbs
Adding Cagri allowed further reduction of calorie intake to 1250-1350 cal/day after weight loss slowed and hunger increased on Tirz alone

side_effects.description: Period stopped completely after prolonged low calorie intake; initially irregular (60-day gap, then spotting), then ceased entirely. Possibly related to caloric deficit and/or perimenopause progression.

protocol_notes: OP is 5'7", 48 years old, perimenopause. Was on 15mg Tirz, added Cagri when weight loss stalled in August and hunger increased. Calorie intake 1250-1350/day. Goal weight 60kg (132 lbs). Currently in a 4-week stall at 136 lbs. Considering switching to maintenance mode. Previously lost 64 lbs over approximately one year.
